title: gmelina asiatica var. philippensis
intro: Gmelina asiatica var. philippensis, also known as White Gmelina or Philippine Gmelina, is a medicinal plant species that belongs to the family Verbenaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Gmelina asiatica var. philippensis include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Gmelina asiatica var. philippensis include tea, infusion, and decoction, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
